what_it_does: Sample iOS, Android, and web apps for ClipDrop APIs such as background removal, inpainting/object cleanup, text removal, and layer decomposition.
succinct_summary: Useful demo plumbing for image cleanup/background workflows backed by hosted ClipDrop APIs.
possible_use: Relevant if Morgan avatar assets need quick background removal, object cleanup, or web demo examples around image preprocessing.
important_notes: API-driven samples, not a self-hosted model implementation; expect external service credentials and costs.
